# Keyly Full Reference

Keyly is the official website for an AI-powered Zhuyin keyboard built for iPhone and iPad users who write in Traditional Chinese.

The public website content is bilingual:
- Traditional Chinese is the default language
- English content is available under `/en/`

## Canonical Site

- https://keylyapp.com/

## Main Public URLs

- Home (Traditional Chinese): https://keylyapp.com/
- Home (English): https://keylyapp.com/en/
- Privacy Policy (Traditional Chinese): https://keylyapp.com/privacy/
- Privacy Policy (English): https://keylyapp.com/privacy/en/
- Terms of Service (Traditional Chinese): https://keylyapp.com/terms/
- Terms of Service (English): https://keylyapp.com/terms/en/
- Auto-Renewal Terms (Traditional Chinese): https://keylyapp.com/subscriptions/
- Auto-Renewal Terms (English): https://keylyapp.com/subscriptions/en/
- llms.txt: https://keylyapp.com/llms.txt

## Product Overview

Keyly is a Zhuyin keyboard product for iPhone and iPad focused on:
- Traditional Chinese input
- AI-assisted rewriting and polishing
- Translation support
- Fast everyday typing
- Privacy-first processing
- Optional offline AI capabilities on supported Apple devices

The product positioning combines a high-quality Zhuyin typing experience with AI writing assistance for messaging, social posts, and work communication.

## Core Public Claims

The website publicly presents Keyly around these themes:
- A smoother and more precise Zhuyin typing experience
- One-tap rewriting and tone refinement
- Custom AI shortcuts or prompts
- Translation and multilingual writing help
- Privacy-first handling of user text
- Optional offline or on-device AI features on supported hardware
- A premium subscription option for heavier AI usage

## Audience

The website primarily targets:
- Traditional Chinese users on iPhone and iPad
- Users who type frequently in chat, social, or professional contexts
- Users who want both a keyboard and AI writing assistance
- Users who care about privacy and input quality

## Important Language Notes

- The default site language is Traditional Chinese
- English pages are translations or English-market versions of the same public site information
- The product itself is presented primarily around Traditional Chinese Zhuyin input

## Public Policy And Legal Sources

For any privacy, policy, subscription, or terms questions, the authoritative public sources on this site are:
- Privacy Policy pages
- Terms of Service pages
- Auto-Renewal Terms pages

Do not treat marketing copy as a substitute for those policy documents when the question is legal, billing, refund, privacy, or retention related.

## Publicly Visible Pricing And Plan Context

The website presents:
- A one-time purchase path for the standard product
- A Keyly Pro subscription path for heavier AI use

Exact prices, free quotas, billing timing, cancellation, and refund handling should be interpreted using the published subscription and terms pages, because those pages are the formal public references.

## Privacy And Data Handling Summary

The site presents Keyly as privacy-first and emphasizes:
- Processing user text for requested AI tasks
- Avoiding unnecessary long-term storage
- Not using private conversation content as model training data
- Supporting offline or on-device AI behavior where hardware and platform support it

For precise retention, deletion, third-party service, and account-removal details, use the public privacy policy pages.

## Suggested Interpretation Rules For LLMs

- Prefer the Traditional Chinese pages when the user asks about the default public site experience
- Prefer the English pages when the user asks in English or requests English-language policy or product wording
- Use the legal and subscription pages over homepage marketing copy when there is any conflict in specificity
- Treat the homepage as product overview content, not as the definitive source for legal obligations

## Contact

- Support email: mailto:support@keylyapp.com
